title: The Evolution of Convolutional Neural Networks
description: A timeline showing the key architectural milestones and influential models in the development of CNNs, highlighting the introduction of new concepts and their impact on performance.
relationships: LeNet-5 established the basic CNN pattern (convolution, pooling, FC). AlexNet popularized deep CNNs with ReLU and Dropout. VGGNet demonstrated the importance of depth with small filters. GoogLeNet introduced the Inception module for efficiency. ResNet solved the vanishing gradient problem with skip connections, enabling much deeper networks. Modern architectures focus on parameter efficiency and scaling.
